item.description:
Release v4.7.0

Changes since v4.6.0

  • feat: add availability indicators to model selector
  • feat: add DownloadKit package for robust file downloading
  • feat(freemodel): route Claude via native API with Claude Code emulation
  • feat(mlx): add button to reveal cache directory in Finder
  • feat(mlx): refactor MLXDownloadManager to use DownloadKit
  • fix(agent-turn): stop AutoTask retry loop on LLM failures
  • fix(i18n): move Localizable.xcstrings into LumiApp and switch to English source language
  • fix(LLMProviderKit): handle SSE [DONE] marker from ZhiPu provider
  • fix(theme): actively sync Lumi system theme when macOS appearance changes
  • i18n: translate or localize content
  • refactor(editor-tab-strip): flatten Sources directory structure
  • refactor(editor-tab-strip): simplify names and group agent tools
  • refactor(settings): adopt GitOK grouped cards and refresh settings pages
  • refactor(settings): align local provider detail layout with remote
  • refactor(settings): unify provider pages and simplify model display
